HxS3oQ.new_value: We use age groups to determine access to certain experiences. It takes 3 minutes on average.
HxS3oQ.old_value: Choose a method to confirm you’re an adult. Once confirmed, you can access age-restricted content and settings.

RpMIT0.new_value: We use age groups to determine access to certain experiences. [Learn more]({handleOnHelpUrlHook})
RpMIT0.old_value: Choose a method to confirm you’re an adult. Once confirmed, you can access age-restricted content and settings. [Learn more]({handleOnHelpUrlHook}).

ZdmRwW.new_value: You’ll need a driver’s license, passport, or other ID. Then a photo selfie to confirm it’s you.
ZdmRwW.old_value: Scan your ID and take a selfie to confirm it’s you. Both are deleted right after confirmation and never linked to your account.

dah4bF.new_value: Verify your age using a digital ID stored in Google Wallet.
dah4bF.old_value: Use an ID Pass based on your passport info. Your ID details stay in Google Wallet.

eJmat5.new_value: Usually fastest and totally automatic. All you need is a camera.
eJmat5.old_value: Estimate your age with a video selfie. Video stays on-device, no biometric data is shared.
